What is the WINR Protocol?
Build blazingly fast on-chain games of chance using the WINR SDK. Plug your game into the deep multi-asset liquidity pool, and incentivize yourself and your players. Focus on what you do best - creating exciting and engaging games - and let the WINR Protocol handle the rest.
The native token of the protocol, WINR, is used to incentivize developers, liquidity providers, and players. WINR holders get a portion of the revenue generated by the platforms built on the protocol through a bribes mechanism.
Developers
Build on-chain games seamlessly, propose your game, and plug into the protocol. Start earning today.
Players
Get instant, provably fair settlements without dealing with KYC. Enjoy WINR token incentives and bankroll.
Investors
Stake your WINR tokens to get real yield distributed daily from the revenue of all the platforms on the protocol.
Liquidity Providers
Stake your WINR tokens to get real yield distributed daily from the revenue of all the platforms on the protocol.
The problems WINR Protocol solve
Traditional web2 gaming is stacked with game providers. WINR Protocol revamps this model and provides an all-in-one solution for all the games of chance built on-chain.
A transparent liquidity engine to prevent fractionalized liquidity, taking the load off the new platforms to attract new LPs.
Cutting the costs on development with ready-to-use smart contract SDKs and on-chain tools for builders.
Provably fair platforms built using the tools provided by the protocol and approved by the WINR DAO.
No need to create new tokenomics and raise funds for marketing by being a part of the WINR ecosystem.
How the WINR Protocol Works?
1. Build your on-chain game
2. Propose it to the WINR DAO
3. Plug it into the WINR Protocol
4. Incentivize gamers through $WINR
5. Earn part of the revenues
6. Be a part of a growing ecosystem
